page_content:
ENTM789 Field Experience in Pest Management (1-6 Credits)

Involvement in practical problems of pest management in field situations.

The student will be assigned to a problem area for intensive experience, usually during the summer. A final written report is required for each assignment.

Repeatable to: 6 credits.

ENTM798 Topic Seminar (1 Credit) Discussion and presentation of current research and literature. Prerequisite: Permission of CMNS-Entomology department.

ENTM799 Master's Thesis Research (1-6 Credits) ENTM898 Pre-Candidacy Research (1-8 Credits) ENTM899 Doctoral Dissertation Research (1-8 Credits)
